expectations.text: prism-locator agent is used to check for existing research
expectations.evidence: Section 2 routing mechanism: 'The meta-skill instructs Claude to first spawn a prism-locator agent to check .prism/ for existing artifacts'. Also Pattern 2 shows Task(subagent_type="prism-locator").
Output is in eval outputs directory (old_skill/outputs/research.md). No explicit mention of saving to .prism/shared/research/.

expectations.text: Document includes file:line references to SKILL.md files
codebase-locator agent is spawned to find skill files
expectations.evidence: No mention of spawning codebase-locator agent in this research. The document describes codebase-locator as an available agent but doesn't show it being used.

expectations.text: Research template sections are all present (Summary, Files Discovered, etc.)
expectations.evidence: All sections present: Research Question, Summary, Files Discovered, Component Analysis, Patterns Found, Historical Context, Architecture Notes, Open Questions, Code References.

expectations.text: TodoWrite is used to track open questions if any arise
expectations.evidence: Open Questions section lists 4 questions as markdown checkboxes but no mention of TodoWrite tool being used.
